description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has shoulder-length, layered hair and is dressed in a two-piece undergarment set. The figure's skin is smooth and evenly toned, with defined limbs and subtle anatomical features. The hands and feet are proportionate, and the facial features are softly modeled, giving a gentle expression. The overall appearance is clean and simplified, suitable for urban simulation or crowd scenes.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a T-pose, wearing a two-piece undergarment set with shoulder-length hair and smooth, simplified features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and extended arms, with clear visibility of the undergarment details and hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the straight alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, hair length, and the back of the undergarments, with arms fully extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the straight alignment of the arms and legs, mirroring the left side.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
